user.title: E-Ink Display Manager
user.description: Select the display for your first profile. You can add more displays later.

data_description.entity_id: The image entity representing your e-ink display

abort.single_instance_allowed: E-Ink Display Manager is already configured.

abort.no_options: Use the + button to add display profiles, or click the gear icon on a specific profile to edit its settings.

user.title: Add display profile
user.description: Select the image entity for your e-ink display. Display dimensions and service will be detected automatically.

data_description.entity_id: The image entity representing your e-ink display (e.g. image.wolink_esl_...)

set_options.title: Edit display profile
set_options.description: Update rendering and schedule settings for this profile.

data_description.compress: Compress image data before BLE transfer (faster for most images)
data_description.mirror: Flip the image before sending (horizontal = left-right, vertical = top-bottom)
data_description.update_interval_minutes: How often to re-render and send to the display. Set to 0 to disable periodic updates.
data_description.trigger_entities: Entities in Jinja2 templates are tracked automatically. Add extra triggers here (e.g. a motion sensor not referenced in the layout).
data_description.trigger_debounce_seconds: Wait this long after the last entity change before rendering. Prevents rapid re-sends.
data_description.retry_delay: Minutes to wait before retrying a failed update.
data_description.retry_count: Number of automatic retries after failure (0 = disabled).

abort.entry_not_loaded: The integration is not loaded. Please reload it first.
